# MDDocs Full Documentation Index

MDDocs is an open-source documentation system built on mdui 2. It provides a Markdown-first content workflow, bilingual routes, sticky navigation, page table of contents, previous/next links, and code-copy interactions.

## English

- Introduction: /docs/2/
- Installation: /docs/2/getting-started/installation
- Usage: /docs/2/getting-started/usage
- Project Structure: /docs/2/getting-started/project-structure
- Markdown Content: /docs/2/getting-started/markdown-content
- Localization: /docs/2/getting-started/localization
- Deployment: /docs/2/getting-started/deployment
- FAQ: /docs/2/getting-started/faq
- AI Overview: /docs/2/ai/overview
- Writing Docs with AI: /docs/2/ai/writing-docs
- Theme Design: /docs/2/styles/theme-design
- Vue and Vite: /docs/2/frameworks/vue-vite
- Component Example: /docs/2/components/component-example
- Function Example: /docs/2/functions/function-example
- Package Example: /docs/2/libraries/package-example

## Chinese

- 概述: /zh-cn/docs/2/
- 安装: /zh-cn/docs/2/getting-started/installation
- 快速入门: /zh-cn/docs/2/getting-started/usage
- 项目结构: /zh-cn/docs/2/getting-started/project-structure
- Markdown 内容: /zh-cn/docs/2/getting-started/markdown-content
- 本地化: /zh-cn/docs/2/getting-started/localization
- 部署发布: /zh-cn/docs/2/getting-started/deployment
- 常见问题: /zh-cn/docs/2/getting-started/faq
- AI 概览: /zh-cn/docs/2/ai/overview
- 用 AI 编写文档: /zh-cn/docs/2/ai/writing-docs
- 主题设计: /zh-cn/docs/2/styles/theme-design
- Vue 与 Vite: /zh-cn/docs/2/frameworks/vue-vite
- 组件示例: /zh-cn/docs/2/components/component-example
- 函数示例: /zh-cn/docs/2/functions/function-example
- 独立包示例: /zh-cn/docs/2/libraries/package-example
